sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n48042" key="qeio/domos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θειό-δομος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n48042.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">built by gods</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τεῖχος</foreign> ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.138</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Acerat.</author> </bibl>), cf. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0101.tlg001:9:104" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.104</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alph.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
